news.headline: Florida Blue Foundation gives Common Threads a $400,000 multi-year grant to tackle food insecurity in Miami.
news.summary: In Miami on December 20, 2024, Common Threads, a nationwide organization focused on nutrition education and promoting healthy cooking, announced the reception of a substantial $400,000 grant from the Florida Blue Foundation. The grant, part of the foundation's Food Security Grant program, will be disbursed over several years to support Common Threads' initiatives.

news.headline: FDA approves Zepbound for obstructive sleep apnea in obese adults with up to 20% weight loss and 25 fewer breathing interruptions.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted by Eli Lilly and Company, it was found that adults who took Zepbound experienced an average weight loss of up to 20%. Additionally, these adults also saw a significant improvement in their sleep quality with at least 25 fewer breathing interruptions per hour. Remarkably, up to 50% of the adults who took Zepbound over the course of one year no longer exhibited symptoms of Obstructive Sleep Apnea (OSA). The findings of this study showcase the potential benefits of Zepbound in managing weight and improving sleep quality in individuals with OSA.

news.headline: Arm loses licensing dispute to Qualcomm (QCOM) in battle over chip designs, significant for tech industry.
House to vote on new GOP stopgap measure after 5 PM ET.
Converge Tech (TSX: CTS) to pay Dec 2024 dividend a day earlier due to holidays.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Converge Technology Solutions Corp. (TSX: CTS) (FSE: 0ZB) (OTCQX: CTSDF) shared an update regarding their previous press release from November 12, 2024. The company, based in Toronto and Gatineau, QC, mentioned that due to the holiday schedule in December 2024, there will be a delay in certain operations.

news.headline: Seven sports celebrities and experts discuss changes in athlete branding at the DealBook Summit.
news.summary: During a recent event, a panel of seven sports personalities and industry experts gathered at the DealBook Summit to explore the evolving landscape of athlete branding. The discussion shed light on the transformation in strategies and approaches adopted by athletes to establish and cultivate their personal brands in the competitive sports industry.

news.headline: Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG) reports unaudited financial results for first half of 2024 from Hong Kong.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Intelligent Living Application Group Inc. (Nasdaq: ILAG), a leading lockset manufacturer and distributor based in Hong Kong, disclosed its unaudited financial performance for the six months concluding...

news.headline: AtlasClear Holdings plans 1-for-60 reverse stock split of common stock (NYSE American: ATCH), effective Dec 31, 2024.
news.summary: TAMPA, Fla.-- AtlasClear Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: ATCH) declared plans for a 1-for-60 reverse stock split of its common stock. This move by the Company is set to be implemented on December 31, 2024, pending the submission of the required amendment to the Company’s amended and restated certificate of incorporation with the Delaware Secretary of State. This consolidation of shares aims to streamline the outstanding shares and enhance the stock's market positioning.

news.headline: Mega Matrix (NYSE: MPU) reveals 2024 AGM results held virtually on Dec 20, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. PT. Shareholders...
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Mega Matrix Inc. (NYSE American: MPU) disclosed outcomes from its 2024 Annual General Meeting conducted virtually at 10:00 a.m. PT. During the meeting, the Company's shareholders: (1)...

news.headline: Mettler-Toledo (NYSE: MTD) to present at J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 14, 2025, 3:45 pm PT. Leader in precision instruments.
news.summary: In Columbus, Ohio, Mettler-Toledo International Inc. (NYSE: MTD) has disclosed its participation in the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference in San Francisco, California, scheduled for Tuesday, January 14, 2025, at 3:45 p.m. PT. A live stream of the presentation will be accessible on the Company’s investor relations portal at investors.mt.com. METTLER TOLEDO (NYSE: MTD) is a prominent worldwide provider of precision instruments and services, boasting significant market influence.

news.headline: Electra Battery Materials Corp announces results of special meeting in Toronto on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Electra Battery Materials Corporation (NASDAQ: ELBM; TSX-V: ELBM) disclosed the outcomes of its special shareholder gathering in Toronto.

news.headline: Lexicon received a Complete Response Letter from the FDA for Zynquista™ (sotagliflozin); confirms prior disclosed FDA decision.
news.summary: Recently, it has been confirmed that the FDA has made a decision that was expected and had been previously disclosed. This decision has been eagerly awaited and comes after much anticipation.

news.headline: Source Energy Services refinances with a $135 million USD term loan with Silver Point Finance, and a $40 million CAD asset-backed loan with CIBC. Reduces outstanding 10.5% Senior Secured Notes due March 15, 2025.
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta, on Dec. 20, 2024, Source Energy Services Ltd. (TSX: SHLE) announced the successful completion of a significant refinancing. The Company secured a new five-year $135 million USD term loan with Silver Point Finance, LLC and a new $40 million CND revolving asset-backed loan facility with the Canadian Imperial Bank of Commerce. The Term Loan will be utilized to redeem the outstanding 10.5% Senior Secured Notes due March 15, 2025, and to repay the amounts drawn on the current asset-backed loan facility.

news.headline: Ultragenyx granted 15,175 restricted stock units to 15 non-executive officers as inducement for joining.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in rare and ultrarare disease therapies, announced the issuance of 15,175 restricted stock units of company stock to 15 newly recruited non-executive officers. These stock units were granted under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on December 16, 2024, following approval from the compensation committee of the board of directors. The issuance was deemed crucial in attracting these new employees as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: Xcel Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: XELB) announces Q3 2024 financial results, highlighting expertise in livestream shopping.
news.summary: In New York on December 20, 2024, Xcel Brands, Inc. (NASDAQ: XELB) disclosed its financial performance for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024. Xcel, a prominent media and consumer products firm acclaimed for its adeptness in livestream shopping and social commerce, revealed their quarterly results on this date.

news.headline: Teva will discuss Q4 and FY 2024 results, and 2025 financial guidance on Jan 29, 2025, at 8 a.m. ET through a conference call.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 20, 2024, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Ltd. (NYSE: TEVA) disclosed plans to release its financial results for Q4 and full year 2024 alongside the financial outlook for 2025. The press release is scheduled for Wednesday, January 29, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. ET, followed by a conference call and live webcast at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day. This information was shared with the public through global news outlets.

news.headline: US bank deposits rose to $17.836 trln from $17.834 trln in the prior week.
News alert: Transparency notifications have been issued, revealing significant shareholdings exceeding 5% in the company.
Liechtenstein becomes 52nd nation to sign NASA's Artemis Accords for space exploration on Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, Liechtenstein officially joined the Artemis Accords, becoming the 52nd nation to do so. The agreement was signed during a ceremony held at NASA headquarters in Washington and was presided over by NASA Deputy Administrator Pam Melroy. Liechtenstein's commitment to the responsible exploration of space aligns with the principles outlined in the accords, aimed at fostering cooperative and sustainable space exploration endeavors.

news.headline: CUB expresses concern over ICC approval of ComEd's grid plan and $606M rate hike in Chicago.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 20, 2024, CUB Executive Director Sarah Moskowitz released a statement regarding the Thursday, December 19 ruling by the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) to authorize a grid plan for Commonwealth Edison and implement a multi-year rate hike of $606 million. Moskowitz expressed concerns about the implications of this decision.

news.headline: KB Home announced grand opening of Westcott Station in Sacramento, offering two-story homes with three bedrooms.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, KB Home (NYSE: KBH) has launched the Westcott Station development in a sought-after neighborhood. These new homes cater to modern living preferences, boasting contemporary kitchens flowing into spacious great rooms, primary suites with walk-in closets, and generous storage areas. The two-story residences at Westcott Station comprise three bedrooms and two-and-a-half bathrooms, illustrating the company's commitment to creating homes that align with current lifestyle needs. This initiative showcases KB Home's dedication to providing top-quality residences in desirable locations.

news.headline: Independent Bank Corporation to release Q4 2024 earnings on Jan 23, 2025 at 8:00 am ET. Check IndependentBank.com for details.
news.summary: Michigan-based community bank, Independent Bank Corporation (NASDAQ: IBCP), is set to reveal its 2024 fourth quarter results on January 23, 2025, around 8:00 am ET. The results will be published on IndependentBank.com under the “News” section of the “Investor Relations” portion of the site.

news.headline: Hawk Tuah girl Hailey Welch cooperates with lawyers suing meme coin partners after waking up.
news.summary: Haliey Welch, the young woman known as Hawk Tuah, has decided to break her silence and is now collaborating with the legal team representing her in a lawsuit against her former business associates involved in the creation of a meme coin.

news.headline: Camden National Corp. gets regulatory nod for merging with Northway Financial, Inc. NASDAQ: CAC. Dec. 20, 2024.
news.summary: In Camden, Maine, on December 20, 2024, Camden National Corporation ("Camden National"), a bank holding company for Camden National Bank, disclosed receiving regulatory green lights for its planned merger. The corporation, trading as NASDAQ: CAC, confirmed that all required approvals have been secured.

news.headline: Canada holds talks with First Nations on Vancouver's popular area's development.
Silver Point hedge fund declined to settle SEC's Puerto Rico lawsuit, per Bloomberg.
Stocks rebounded, Dow Jones and indexes trim gains. Nvidia climbs after bullish report on easing inflation. Live coverage.
news.summary: The stock market experienced a boost as a report indicated a decrease in inflation. Today, the Dow Jones and other major indexes bounced back, although their gains were slightly reduced. Nvidia saw an increase in stock value following a positive report.

news.headline: FSK Capital Corp prices public offering of $100 million 6.125% unsecured notes due 2030.
news.summary: On December 20, 2024, FS KKR Capital Corp. disclosed the pricing of an underwritten public offering to raise $100 million through an additional issuance of its 6.125% notes due 2030. This move involves a reopening of the existing Notes to bring in more funds. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FSK, is utilizing this opportunity to further its financial endeavors by expanding its debt securities with this offering.

news.headline: ALAMO Group Inc. CEO Jeff Leonard to retire by mid-year 2025; successor to be appointed. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: Seguin, Texas, December 20, 2024 - Alamo Group Inc. has disclosed that Jeff Leonard, the current President and CEO, plans to retire around mid-year 2025 once his successor is named. Leonard informed the Board of Directors about his decision. Alamo Group Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALG.

news.headline: Boston Beer updates financial guidance for 2024 due to supplier contract amendment with Rauch. $26 million paid to Rauch.
news.summary: Boston Beer Company, Inc. (NYSE: SAM) revealed on December 20, 2024, its efforts to enhance supply chain efficiency by updating a production agreement with Rauch North America Inc. The amended agreement, which involves a $26 million cash payout to Rauch by December 23, 2024, aligns production terms more closely with the Company's upcoming capacity needs. This adjustment grants the Company greater production adaptability and improved termination options.

news.headline: National Healthcare Properties Inc. (Nasdaq: HTIA / HTIBP) to pay dividends on Series A Preferred Stock at $1.84 annually.
news.summary: National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (Nasdaq: HTIA / HTIBP), previously known as Healthcare Trust, Inc., has disclosed its plans to maintain quarterly dividends on its 7.375% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock. The dividends will be paid at an annual rate of $1.84375 per share or $0.4609375 per share quarterly. Dividends for the Series A Preferred Stock are paid retrospectively to Series A Preferred shareholders.

news.headline: Benefit Street Partners and Aker acquire 55 Riverwalk in West New York, NJ for $158.5 million facilitated by JLL.
news.summary: Benefit Street Partners L.L.C. (BSP) has revealed that Aker, in collaboration with multiple BSP-managed vehicles, has purchased 55 Riverwalk in West New York, New Jersey for $158.5 million. The acquisition was overseen by Jose Cruz, Steve Simonelli, Mike Oliver, Elizabeth DeVesty, and Austin Pierce at JLL representing the seller, a global real estate investment advisor. Positioned along the Hudson River, 55 Riverwalk is a meticulously crafted residential community.

news.headline: Clorox stock sees boost with rising price performance, leading to upgrade in IBD Relative Strength Rating.
news.summary: After displaying improving price performance, Clorox has received an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating. This upgrade is a reflection of the company's strong performance in comparison to other stocks in the market. This boost in rating indicates a positive trend for Clorox amidst market fluctuations, highlighting its resilience and potential for investment growth. The specifics of the upgrade, including the new rating and the extent of the price performance improvement, were not disclosed in the news.

news.headline: DaVita stock's relative strength rating has improved, suggesting better technical performance - will the trend persist?
news.summary: DaVita recently received a Relative Strength Rating upgrade, indicating an enhancement in its technical performance. The question now arises whether this positive momentum will persist. This development was highlighted in an article on Investor's Business Daily discussing DaVita's improved Relative Strength Rating.

news.headline: FedEx stock outperformed UPS in 2024, but retreats after freight spin off. Investor's Business Daily reports.
news.summary: In 2024, FedEx has surpassed UPS in stock performance. Following the news of FedEx's freight spin-off, FedEx stock experienced a decline despite initially being positively received by the market.

news.headline: Philadelphia250 announces Danielle DiLeo Kim's leadership transition for America's 250th anniversary in 2026.
news.summary: In Philadelphia on December 20, 2024, PHILADELPHIA250, the group responsible for organizing and executing Philadelphia's neighborhood-centric events for America's 250th anniversary in 2026, revealed that Danielle DiLeo Kim has notified the Board of Directors.

news.headline: Fed cut rates by 25 basis points to 4.25%-4.5%. Powell's Hawkish stance ends hopes for more cuts as Dollar surges, Bitcoin below $100k.
news.summary: During a significant December meeting, the Federal Reserve implemented a 25-basis-point interest rate cut, landing the target range at 4.25%-4.5%. The impact was felt heavily in the markets, with Chair Jerome Powell's revised economic forecasts causing shockwaves on Wall Street. The Fed's projections for 2025 included a rise in inflation estimates, indicating only two potential rate cuts for the year. This abrupt change in direction from previous expectations had a substantial impact on investor sentiment. Powell further solidified the Fed's more conservative approach by mentioning a planned 100-basis-point reduction in 2024 during a press conference. The market's reaction and the Fed's stance are discussed in detail in the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Traders hopeful for Santa Rally as Nasdaq tops 22,000 but stunned by Fed tone shift, hinting at pause on rate cuts.
news.summary: The stock market started off positively with the Nasdaq 100 hitting a record high of 22,000 and expectations of interest rate cuts by the Federal Reserve. This fueled hopes of a traditional year-end Santa Rally for Wall Street in 2025. However, midweek, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell's hawkish comments led to a sudden downturn. Powell hinted at a pause in rate cuts, signaling a new phase in monetary policy. The market took a hit as the possibility of further rate cuts decreased. This unexpected shift dampened the festive spirit on Wall Street as traders were met with uncertainty.

news.headline: Candlelight vigil in Hollywood on Dec 21 from 5-6 pm to mark National Homeless Person’s Memorial Day.
news.summary: A candlelight vigil will be held in Hollywood on Saturday, December 21st from 5:00 to 6:00 pm to commemorate National Homeless Person’s Memorial Day. This event aims to remember and honor those who have passed away while experiencing homelessness.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up, Bitcoin high; Nasdaq steady, Fed meeting ahead. Palantir, Nvidia focus.
news.summary: The Nasdaq index remained elevated while market breadth weakened. Investors are anticipating the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting, with a focus on technology companies Palantir and Nvidia. Dow Jones futures saw an increase, and Bitcoin reached a new high. Palantir experienced a reversal in its stock price trend following recent gains.

news.headline: Expion360 CFO to step down per company announcement.
Horizon Aircraft receives $8.4M investment, reaffirming investor commitment to operations and development.
news.summary: Investor shows increased commitment to Horizon Aircraft, reaffirming their support for ongoing operations and development. This showcases a strong dedication towards the company's growth and future prospects.

news.headline: Trump supports the ILA, which may strike due to automation negotiations.
news.summary: President-elect Donald J. Trump has expressed his backing for the International Longshoremen’s Association, a union that is on the verge of striking if an agreement on automation with employers is not reached soon. The association represents around 65,000 workers and has been a focal point in recent negotiations. The potential strike could have significant implications on the shipping and logistics industries, causing disruptions in ports and supply chains.

news.headline: Powell clashes with Trump as interest rates may not lower as much or quickly as anticipated. Trump prefers low rates.
news.summary: The reduction in rates may not be as significant or rapid as previously anticipated, while Trump, who describes himself as a supporter of low rates, is back in the White House.

news.headline: AI-driven digital avatars are transforming customer service across industries, offering multilingual and personalized support. More at NVIDIA.
news.summary: NVIDIA reports that AI-driven digital avatars are revolutionizing customer service by delivering customized assistance in multiple languages, benefiting various sectors. The innovation is reshaping business operations and elevating customer satisfaction levels. Explore further to understand the impact of these advancements on enhancing user interaction.

news.headline: Millennials prioritize investing in stocks, ETFs, personal finance, and managing student loans for retirement planning.
news.summary: Explore the unique investment strategies and retirement planning techniques of millennials, shedding light on unexpected trends. Research suggests that this generation is opting for a mix of stocks, ETFs, and personal finance ventures while managing student loan burdens. Such insights challenge traditional notions of financial planning, reflecting the evolving landscape of millennial investment behaviors.

news.headline: Recursion Pharmaceuticals granted 7,952,836 RSU awards to 230 new employees, per Nasdaq rules, in connection with an acquisition.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Recursion Pharmaceuticals, Inc. based in Salt Lake City, Utah, disclosed that the Compensation Committee of its Board of Directors sanctioned the allocation of inducement restricted stock unit (RSU) awards. These awards encompass 7,952,836 shares of its class A common stock and were designated for 230 new employees. This action was taken under Recursion's 2024 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. The RSUs were granted to new employees upon their commencement of employment with a subsidiary of Recursion as part of the company's acquisition of Exscientia plc. This move adhered to Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) regarding inducement grants.

news.headline: Senate investigation led by Bernie Sanders reveals Amazon ignored internal warnings on injuries despite high injury rates.
news.summary: A recent staff report from the Senate labor committee, which was led by Bernie Sanders, revealed that there have been internal discussions about the high rates of injuries within the e-commerce giant.

news.headline: Dow Jones rises ahead of Fed meeting, Super Micro plunges after Nasdaq 100 removal.
news.summary: On Monday, the Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced an increase in its value in anticipation of the upcoming Federal Reserve meeting scheduled for later this week. However, Super Micro saw a significant decline in its stock price after being removed from the Nasdaq 100 index. This news comes as investors are closely monitoring the market. The Dow Jones rose by a certain number of points, indicating positive momentum, while Super Micro faced a notable drop following its removal from the index.

news.headline: Imbue's CEO Kanjun Qiu examines AI agents' future, highlighting their collaboration with users like during the PC revolution.
news.summary: Kanjun Qiu, the Chief Executive Officer of Imbue, recently discussed the growing role of AI agents in collaboration with users, drawing parallels to the personal computer revolution. This signifies a significant shift in the way technology is shaping human interaction, as AI agents continue to evolve. The insights shared by Qiu shed light on the potential impact of these advancements on various industries and users. This development highlights the increasing integration of AI technology, indicating a transformative period akin to the rise of personal computers. Such discussions are crucial as businesses and individuals navigate this new era of AI, with implications for various sectors.
